        intro x hx

      · rw [← i.toLinearMap.range_eq_top, i.toLinearMap_apply_eq_span_range_of]
        rw [Set.range_comp]

        ext x

        exact ⟨fun ⟨y, hy⟩ ↦ hy ▸ y.2, fun hx ↦ ⟨⟨x, hx⟩, rfl⟩⟩
    let e : MonoidAlgebra R M ≃ₐ[R] Γ(G, ⊤) := AlgEquiv.ofBijective i hi
    let e_hopf : CommHopfAlgCat.of R (MonoidAlgebra R M) ≅ CommHopfAlgCat.of R (Γ(G, ⊤)) :=
      CommHopfAlgCat.isoOfElements _ _ e (by intro m; simp [i, e]; exact m.2.1)

      Scheme.Spec.mapIso total_hopf.toCommRingCatIso.op
    let iso3 : Spec (.of (MonoidAlgebra R (Multiplicative A))) ≅ Diag (Spec R) A :=
      (diagSpecIso R A).symm
    refine .of_iso (iso1 ≪≫ iso2 ≪≫ iso3)

      MonoidAlgebra.of.algEquivOfLinearEquivTriple h_li
        (by rw [← h]; exact Submodule.span_eq_of_set_eq_set (by simp)) (fun _ _ ↦ rfl)
    let e : G ≅ Diag (Spec R) A :=
      (Scheme.GammaSpecIso G).symm ≪≫ (Scheme.Spec.mapIso φ.symm.toAlgIso.op) ≪≫ (diagSpecIso R A).symm
    refine ⟨A, inferInstance, e, inferInstance, { hom_mul := ?_ }⟩
    have hφ : (Bialgebra.comulAlgHom R Γ(G, ⊤)).comp φ.toAlgHom =
        (AlgHom.comp (TensorProduct.map φ.toAlgHom φ.toAlgHom) (Bialgebra.comulAlgHom R _)) := by
      ext a; simp [IsGroupLikeElem.map_comul a.2]
    have hφ_symm : (Bialgebra.comulAlgHom R _).comp φ.symm.toAlgHom =
        (AlgHom.comp (TensorProduct.map φ.symm.toAlgHom φ.symm.toAlgHom) (Bialgebra.comulAlgHom R _)) := by
      rw [← AlgEquiv.comp_symm_eq_comp_iff_symm_comp (φ.toAlgEquiv) (AlgEquiv.tensorProduct φ.toAlgEquiv φ.toAlgEquiv)]
      exact hφ
    have : (e.hom ≫ (diagSpecIso R A).hom ≫ (Scheme.GammaSpecIso (Spec (MonoidAlgebra R S))).hom).app ⊤ =
        φ.symm.toAlgHom := by
      simp only [e, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.op_hom, Scheme.Spec.mapIso_inv,
        Scheme.GammaSpecIso_inv, Scheme.comp_app, Scheme.GammaSpecIso_naturality,
        Scheme.GammaSpecIso_spec_app_self, Scheme.Spec.map_app_self, Category.assoc]
      rfl
    apply Scheme.Hom.from_app_injective (Scheme.GammaSpecIso _).hom inferInstance
    simp only [asOver_hom, Scheme.GammaSpecIso_hom_naturality_assoc, this,
      ← Scheme.Spec.map_mul (R := CommRingCat.of (MonoidAlgebra R S)),
      ← Scheme.Spec.map_comp, ← CommRingCat.ofHom_comp, hφ_symm]
    rfl
